# FISHING: inline `_fish` directives, handled by tutorial.py (_do_fishing).
# fishCaught needs the fishId from fishBite, so fishing can't be a plain
# replay — the player runs startFishing -> fishBite -> fishCaught ->
# fishRewarded for each fish. Drop a directive wherever fishing is needed:
#   {"action":"_fish","count":N}              -> buy ceil(N/5) packs, catch N
#   {"action":"_fish","count":N,"packs":"a-b"} -> buy random a..b packs, catch N
#   {"action":"_fish","count":N,"packs":2}     -> buy exactly 2 packs, catch N
# Here: catch 6 (random 1-2 packs), then catch 5 more.
{"action":"_fish","count":6,"packs":"2-3"}
{"action":"_fish","count":5}
